description: Convert every mocked test into real validation against deployed APIs or live integrations. No fake assertions.

userStories.title: Make tests real batch 1
userStories.description: Replace mocked tests with real assertions in 8 files (281 violations).
acceptanceCriteria: All listed files contain zero mock violations (vi.mock/vi.fn/jest.mock/mockResolvedValue/etc).
Tests use real-system assertions (deployed API / live service behavior) rather than imported route handlers.
Batch verification command passes: node scripts/quality/check-no-mock-tests.mjs --files "<comma-separated-files>".
Progress entry appended to scripts/ralph-real-test-remediation/progress.txt.

userStories.title: Test Discord notification hooks (real webhooks)
userStories.description: Add real integration coverage for Discord notification channels and live webhook delivery for test user + admin endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates or updates Discord channels via /api/v1/notification-channels using deployed API_BASE_URL.
Sends test notifications through /api/v1/notification-channels/{id}/test and validates successful delivery response.
Fails fast with clear error when DISCORD_TEST_USER_NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL or DISCORD_ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL is missing.
No vi.mock / vi.fn usage in the story file.
Progress entry appended to scripts/ralph-real-test-remediation/progress.txt.
userStories.notes: Manual live-integration story added by request. Uses real Discord webhook endpoints from local env.
